projects.title: EQ & Reverb Engine (C++)
projects.description: Real-time audio effects engine with SIMD and OpenMP optimizations, achieving 5x faster processing via IIR filters and CUDA exploration.

projects.title: Music Lyrics Similarity Search System (Py)
projects.description: Semantic search for music lyrics using embeddings and FAISS, 10x faster than traditional file systems, with Docker containerization.

projects.title: Industrial Cargo Service (Qak/Kotlin)
projects.description: Microservices-based automated cargo system with DDR robot GUI, orchestrated via Docker Compose and SCRUM methodology.

projects.title: Earthquake Detection Edge-Cloud System (Py)
projects.description: AI-powered edge-cloud system for earthquake damage detection using ESP32 and Detectron2, aiding disaster response.

projects.title: Music Data Mining & Feature Analysis (Py)
projects.description: Data mining on music datasets with association rules, clustering, and Random Forest for uncovering musical patterns.

projects.title: Distributed Music Synchronization (Java)
projects.description: Synchronized distributed music playback with Java clients, Docker, and Kubernetes, optimized for low latency.
